UserAccount.title: User Account
UserAccount.description: User profile containing registration and subscription plan structure.

displayName.description: The user's full name or screen name.

resumesCount.description: Total number of resumes created by this user.

lettersCount.description: Total number of cover letters created.

ResumeDocument.title: Resume Document
ResumeDocument.description: Structure representing a user's resume and all its builder contents.

data.description: The nested sections data of the resume resume details.

CoverLetterDocument.title: Cover Letter Document
CoverLetterDocument.description: Structure representing a user's cover letter.

FeedbackItem.title: Feedback Item
FeedbackItem.description: User feedback regarding bug reports or suggestions, accessed by admins.

ActivityLog.title: Activity Log
ActivityLog.description: System usage logging for users and administrators to audit activities.

users/{userId}.description: Collection storing basic user profiles, subscription status and quota.

resumes/{resumeId}.description: Collection of all client resumes, protected to prevent security leakage across users.

coverLetters/{letterId}.description: Tailored cover letters generated by or for users.

feedbacks/{feedbackId}.description: User-submitted bug reports and feature requests for administrative governance.

activities/{activityId}.description: User-specific operations logs recorded for usage audit.
